name: Exploring an Open Relationship
description: How actively you want to start exploring openness — the appetite and the pace, not whether.

curious: Yes — I want to start exploring
I'm only ready to think about it

meaning.mutual: You both want to explore opening up, at a pace you set together.
meaning.adjacent: You're both curious about opening up, worth talking through the pace.

name: Where We Take This Next
description: How you feel about where your relationship is now — and where you want it to go from here.

established: I want to slow things down

meaning.mutual: You both feel it's time to talk about where this goes next.
meaning.adjacent: You're both sensing it's time to revisit this, worth comparing where you land.

name: Swinging or Playing Together
description: Sexual experiences with others that you share as a couple — same room, same event, together.

meaning.mutual: You both want to explore playing together, side by side.
meaning.adjacent: You're both open to playing together, worth talking through the details.

name: Taking Trips Apart
description: Spending holidays, vacations, or major events apart rather than always together.

curious: I need us together for those

meaning.mutual: You both want room for trips apart.
meaning.adjacent: You're both open to trips apart, worth talking through what that looks like.

name: Polyamory — Loving More Than One
description: Developing deep romantic love with more than one person, with everyone's knowledge and consent.

meaning.mutual: You both want space for loving more than one person.
meaning.adjacent: You're both open to loving more than one, worth exploring what that means to each of you.

name: Our Relationship Comes First
description: Keeping your partnership the clear 'primary,' with other connections second.

meaning.mutual: You both want your relationship to stay the priority.
meaning.adjacent: You're both leaning toward keeping this relationship first, worth naming what that looks like.

name: Emotional Connections With Others
description: Forming meaningful emotional bonds — not just sexual ones — outside your partnership.

meaning.mutual: You both want room for emotional connections outside this relationship.
meaning.adjacent: You're both open to emotional connections outside, worth talking through the shape of that.

name: New Relationship Energy (NRE)
description: The excitement and intensity of a new connection — the butterflies, the giddiness — yours or theirs.

curious: I can't be okay with it
established: I won't go through that again

meaning.mutual: You both want to feel that new-relationship spark again.
meaning.adjacent: You're both drawn to new-relationship energy, worth talking through what that means for you.

name: Your Partner Falling in Love
description: The possibility that your partner develops deep romantic feelings for someone else.

established: I've seen it and we're solid

meaning.mutual: You're both open to your partner falling in love with someone else.
meaning.adjacent: You're both open to the idea, worth talking through what it would actually feel like.

name: Handling Jealousy Together
description: Whether you work through jealous feelings as a team, or handle them on your own.

curious: Let's face it as a team
I'd rather deal with it alone

meaning.mutual: You both want to build a shared way of handling jealousy.
meaning.adjacent: You're both thinking about jealousy, worth comparing how you each want to handle it.

name: Group Sexual Experiences
description: Sexual experiences involving more than two people — threesomes, moresomes, group play.

meaning.mutual: You both want to explore group sexual experiences.
meaning.adjacent: You're both curious about group experiences, worth talking through what feels right.

name: Hearing the Intimate Details of Dates
description: How much you want to know about your partner's experiences with others.

established: I still want the full story

meaning.mutual: You both want to hear the intimate details of each other's dates.
meaning.adjacent: You're both open to sharing details, worth agreeing on how much.

name: Safer Sex Boundaries
description: How firm your agreements are about protection, testing, and barriers with others.

meaning.mutual: You both want clear safer-sex boundaries in place.
meaning.adjacent: You're both thinking about safer sex, worth aligning on the specifics.

name: Overnight Stays With Others
description: You or your partner spending the night at someone else's place after a date.

meaning.mutual: You both want to be open to overnight stays with others.
meaning.adjacent: You're both open to overnight stays, worth talking through what works for you.

name: Time and Attention
description: How you share time — evenings, weekends, trips — when other connections are in the picture.

established: I need more of your time back

meaning.mutual: You both want to talk about how time and attention get shared.
meaning.adjacent: You're both thinking about time and attention, worth comparing what each of you needs.

name: Joint Finances for Outside Dates
description: Whether shared money funds dating others, or outside dates stay self-funded.

established: We need separate finances for this

meaning.mutual: You both want a shared approach to finances for outside dates.
meaning.adjacent: You're both open to the idea, worth working out the specifics together.

name: Reconnection Time After a Date
description: Whether you want a ritual to reconnect after a date, or space to decompress alone.

curious: I'll want to reconnect right away
established: I like it, don't need it

meaning.mutual: You both want reconnection time built in after a date.
meaning.adjacent: You're both thinking about reconnection time, worth agreeing on what that looks like.

name: Meeting Your Partner's Other Connections
description: Getting to know the people your partner dates or is involved with (metamours).

established: I keep metamours at arm's length

meaning.mutual: You both want to meet each other's other connections.
meaning.adjacent: You're both open to meeting metamours, worth talking through when and how.

name: Who Knows About Us
description: How open you are with friends, family, or community about being non-monogamous.

meaning.mutual: You both have thoughts on who knows about this relationship.
meaning.adjacent: You're both thinking about disclosure, worth agreeing on where the lines are.
